'''ragasa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xuwenyuanite|xuwenyuanite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-g-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xuwenyuanite|xuwenyuanite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ragasa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:rægæsæth|rægæsæth]] || [[word:rægæsæj|rægæsæj]] || [[word:rægæsæsh|rægæsæsh]] || [[word:rægæsæ|rægæsæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ragagasath|ragagasath]] || [[word:ragagasaj|ragagasaj]] || [[word:ragagasash|ragagasash]] || [[word:ragagasa|ragagasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ragasath|ragasath]] || [[word:ragasaj|ragasaj]] || [[word:ragasash|ragasash]] || [[word:ragasa|ragasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ragafsath|ragafsath]] || [[word:ragafsaj|ragafsaj]] || [[word:ragafsash|ragafsash]] || [[word:ragafsaf|ragafsaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ragasatha|ragasatha]] || [[word:ragasaja|ragasaja]] || [[word:ragasasha|ragasasha]] || [[word:ragasaka|ragasaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ragasath|ragasath]] || [[word:ragasaj|ragasaj]] || [[word:ragasash|ragasash]] || [[word:ragasa|ragasa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ragasathal|ragasathal]] || [[word:ragasajal|ragasajal]] || [[word:ragasashal|ragasashal]] || [[word:ragasakal|ragasakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ragasathatha|ragasathatha]] || [[word:ragasajaja|ragasajaja]] || [[word:ragasashasha|ragasashasha]] || [[word:ragasaka|ragasaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ragasathan|ragasathan]] || [[word:ragasajan|ragasajan]] || [[word:ragasashan|ragasashan]] || [[word:ragasakan|ragasakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ragasathaoro|ragasathaoro]] || [[word:ragasajaoro|ragasajaoro]] || [[word:ragasashaoro|ragasashaoro]] || [[word:ragasakaoro|ragasakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
